title: Qlog Sequential JSON Text Sequences Verification
scope: Verify the sequential qlog envelope and JSON Text Sequences serializer boundary over the existing qlog core model. The slice covers a single trace header, RS/LF framing, lowercase qlog field names, and sequential-specific rejection of trace errors or extra trace components.
verification_method: Requirement-homed unit tests and contained JSON regression coverage.
preconditions: The contained JSON serializer remains available for regression comparison.
procedure: Run the core and QUIC test projects.
Verify that sequential JSON Text Sequences output is emitted as RS-delimited records with lowercase qlog field names.
Confirm that contained JSON round-tripping still passes.
expected_result: Sequential qlog serialization passes the requirement-homed tests and the contained JSON baseline remains green.
